title: Vantaa, Uusimaa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Vantaa is a city in Uusimaa with a population of 236,000. Home to Helsinki Airport, a diverse suburban city with extensive parks, shopping centers, and aviation industry.
